primary.$description: Microbird Commercial Blue — limited palette from Figma. Steps 1, 9-12 mapped; steps 2-8 inherit from Acorn base. Steps 9=11 and 10=12 share values — expected for limited palettes.

1.$description: Brand-tinted light background (Figma: Background / lighter highlight).

11.$description: Accessible text blue — same as hero (Figma: Text dark). High contrast on white.

12.$description: Darkest blue (Figma: darker highlight). Same as step 10 for limited palette.

overlay.$description: Microbird shared neutral gray (from Generic palette). Pure neutral — no warm sand tint like Acorn. Only steps 1, 3, 12 provided; others inherit from Acorn.

12.$description: Darkest neutral (Figma: Generic bg dark / Text dark).

on-primary.$description: Light text on dark blue primary. Figma: Text light = #FCFDFF on #004883.
